props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the text will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: checked
props.description: Marks the checkbox item as selected.

props.name: description
props.description: Additional description text displayed below the checkbox label.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable this control. It will not receive focus or events.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error on the checkbox item.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets a unique id for the checkbox element.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Shows a mixed/partial selection state. Used for 'Select All' checkboxes when some items are selected.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the checkbox.

props.name: name
props.description: Unique name to identify the checkbox.

props.name: revealAriaLabel
props.description: Text announced by screen readers when the reveal slot content is displayed.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the checkbox. 'compact' reduces spacing for dense layouts.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: text
props.description: Label shown beside the checkbox.

props.name: value
props.description: The value binding.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the checkbox selection changes.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Additional description text displayed below the checkbox label.

slots.name: reveal
slots.description: Content revealed when the checkbox is checked.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the text will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: checked
props.description: Marks the checkbox item as selected.

props.name: description
props.description: Sets additional description content displayed below the checkbox label. Accepts plain text or a template.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets the disabled state for the control.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the error state for the control.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute of the underlying web component.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Shows a mixed/partial selection state. Used for 'Select All' checkboxes when some items are selected.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the checkbox.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: name
props.description: Sets the name of the checkbox input for form submission.

props.name: revealArialLabel
props.description: Text announced by screen readers when the reveal slot content is displayed.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the checkbox. 'compact' reduces spacing for dense layouts.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: text
props.description: Label shown beside the checkbox.

props.name: value
props.description: The value binding.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Emits when the checkbox value changes. Emits the new checkbox state as a GoabCheckboxOnChangeDetail object.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Additional description text displayed below the checkbox label.

slots.name: reveal
slots.description: Content revealed when the checkbox is checked.
